name: llm-transpile
description: Auto-compress .md, .html, .txt files read by coding agents via PreToolUse hook.

interface.shortDescription: Token-optimized document reader — ~27% Markdown compression (genuine), up to 90% on HTML markup stripping (cl100k-measured).
interface.longDescription: Silently compresses .md, .html, and .txt files on Read via PreToolUse hook, cutting context usage by ~27% on Markdown (cl100k-measured) with zero workflow change.
